enum/Check/NAMED_FLAGS.name: NAMED_FLAGS
enum/Check/NAMED_FLAGS.description: Ensure that any flag groups/masks contain only named flags – useful when values are specified instead of being generated by auto(): >>> from enum import Flag, verify, NAMED_FLAGS >>> @verify(NAMED_FLAGS) ... class Color(Flag): ... RED = 1 ... GREEN = 2 ... BLUE = 4 ... WHITE = 15 ... NEON = 31 Traceback (most recent call last): ... ValueError: invalid Flag 'Color': aliases WHITE and NEON are missing combined values of 0x18 [use enum.show_flag_values(value) for details]

enum/Enum/name.name: name
enum/Enum/name.description: The name used to define the Enum member: >>> Color.BLUE.name 'BLUE'

info.excerpt: The name used to define the Enum member: >>> Color.BLUE.name 'BLUE'

enum/nonmember.name: nonmember
enum/nonmember.description: A decorator for use in enums: its target will not become a member. Added in version 3.11.

info.excerpt: A decorator for use in enums: its target will not become a member. Added in version 3.11.
